working_on: PDG papers extraction Session β (Kant/phenomenology walkthrough) + inline housekeeping #146 (main repo .venv iCloud corruption rebuild) + #147 (engine/changelog/**/*.md to OPERATIONAL_ALLOWLIST after ADR 0092 cutover).

outcome_summary: PDG Session β authored: kant_walkthrough.md (601 lines) walks 8-data-point phenomenology subgraph through Cluster 2/4/5/8 schema, output 5 accommodations + 5 conflicts + 5 gaps + 8 Session δ items + 4 Session γ items, with phenomenology worked examples for each. Three load-bearing empirical findings: aliases-field dual-use motivates tradition_label; historical-influence-as-fallback pattern motivates Cluster 2 three-layer partition; Kantian-transcendental concept-node absence blocks the paper's exemplar (Phase 6 substrate-readiness item for Session γ). Quality-first posture held — no Issues fire, no ADRs land. Inline housekeeping: #146 closed (main repo .venv rebuilt; 0 dup-files post; jsonschema imports), #147 closed (engine/changelog/**/*.md added to OPERATIONAL_ALLOWLIST + new test_close_accepts_changelog_md_edit; 40/40 + 20/20 pytests green). Cold-review surfaced pre-existing docstring/tuple drift in check_routine_scope.py (diary_pending_index.json + new changelog glob missing from docstring) — fixed in-context. engine_memory lesson drawer authored on cutover-spread-site-blindspot pattern generalizing #147 root cause. Pre-phase progress: Sessions α + β complete; γ-ζ pending per HANDOFF.md.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — all three components landed cleanly. PDG Session β deliverable authored at the planned scope (8 data-points, 5+5+5+8+4 finding categories per outline). Issue #146 fix executed via the prescribed rm -rf + uv sync recipe with both verification probes passing. Issue #147 fix added the canonical allowlist entry + new accept-test; structural test auto-locked the spread. One inline addition (check_routine_scope.py docstring sync) was a fix-in-context cold-review finding, within the standing fix-in-context discipline, not a scope expansion.

next_session_handle_rationale: outcome_summary's references to Session γ / δ / ε / ζ + the 'Phase 6 substrate-readiness item for Session γ' phrase are intentional forward-pointer prose for the 6-session PDG pre-phase plan documented in HANDOFF.md, not deferrals of unaddressed bugs. Per ADR 0049 Decision 6, explicit null is the correct value when hedge-shaped phrasing is intentional forward-pointer prose.
